targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(projekt_nr::text, bereich_neu, 'N/A') AS "Tour",
  ROUND(dauer::numeric, 2) AS "Duration"
FROM xl_projecttimes
WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
  AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
  AND dauer IS NOT NULL
  AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}))
ORDER BY datum DESC, dauer DESC
LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  bin_label AS "Bin",
  COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Frequency"
FROM (
  SELECT dauer,
    CASE
      WHEN dauer <= 2 THEN '≤ 2'
      WHEN dauer <= 5.5 THEN '(2, 5.5]'
      WHEN dauer <= 9 THEN '(5.5, 9]'
      WHEN dauer <= 12.5 THEN '(9, 12.5]'
      WHEN dauer <= 16 THEN '(12.5, 16]'
      WHEN dauer <= 19.5 THEN '(16, 19.5]'
      WHEN dauer <= 23 THEN '(19.5, 23]'
      WHEN dauer <= 26.5 THEN '(23, 26.5]'
      WHEN dauer <= 30 THEN '(26.5, 30]'
      ELSE '> 30'
    END AS bin_label,
    CASE
      WHEN dauer <= 2 THEN 1
      WHEN dauer <= 5.5 THEN 2
      WHEN dauer <= 9 THEN 3
      WHEN dauer <= 12.5 THEN 4
      WHEN dauer <= 16 THEN 5
      WHEN dauer <= 19.5 THEN 6
      WHEN dauer <= 23 THEN 7
      WHEN dauer <= 26.5 THEN 8
      WHEN dauer <= 30 THEN 9
      ELSE 10
    END AS sort_order
  FROM xl_projecttimes
  WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
    AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
    AND dauer IS NOT NULL
    AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}))
) sub
GROUP BY bin_label, sort_order
ORDER BY sort_order

WITH src AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN dauer <= 2 THEN '≤ 2'
      WHEN dauer <= 5.5 THEN '(2, 5.5]'
      WHEN dauer <= 9 THEN '(5.5, 9]'
      WHEN dauer <= 12.5 THEN '(9, 12.5]'
      WHEN dauer <= 16 THEN '(12.5, 16]'
      WHEN dauer <= 19.5 THEN '(16, 19.5]'
      WHEN dauer <= 23 THEN '(19.5, 23]'
      WHEN dauer <= 26.5 THEN '(23, 26.5]'
      WHEN dauer <= 30 THEN '(26.5, 30]'
      ELSE '> 30'
    END AS bin_label,
    CASE
      WHEN dauer <= 2 THEN 1
      WHEN dauer <= 5.5 THEN 2
      WHEN dauer <= 9 THEN 3
      WHEN dauer <= 12.5 THEN 4
      WHEN dauer <= 16 THEN 5
      WHEN dauer <= 19.5 THEN 6
      WHEN dauer <= 23 THEN 7
      WHEN dauer <= 26.5 THEN 8
      WHEN dauer <= 30 THEN 9
      ELSE 10
    END AS sort_order
  FROM xl_projecttimes
  WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
    AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
    AND dauer IS NOT NULL
    AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${year:raw}' = '$__all' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM datum)::text IN (${year:sqlstring}))
),
agg AS (
  SELECT bin_label, sort_order, COUNT(*)::numeric AS freq
  FROM src
  GROUP BY bin_label, sort_order
)
SELECT
  sort_order AS "Bin #",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(freq) OVER (ORDER BY sort_order ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) / NULLIF(SUM(freq) OVER (), 0), 2) AS "Cumulative %"
FROM agg
ORDER BY sort_order

list.label: Year
list.name: year
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT jahr::text FROM xl_projecttimes ORDER BY 1 DESC

list.label: Service
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bereich_neu FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE bereich_neu IS NOT NULL ORDER BY bereich_neu

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT task_new FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE task_new IS NOT NULL ORDER BY task_new

list.label: Employee
list.name: employee
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT mitarbeiter FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE mitarbeiter IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mitarbeiter
